overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player character navigates crosswalks, walks beneath elevated highways, crosses busy intersections with futuristic traffic, and enters a narrow alleyway. The environment features dense Japanese-inspired cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage.

events.description: steps onto concrete sidewalk from crosswalk, approaching building entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward a building with illuminated vertical neon signs

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crosswalk with bold yellow stripes
tall commercial building with vertical neon light strips and large digital displays
low concrete barrier separating sidewalk from street
large illuminated billboard displaying animated advertisements
building entrance with glass doors and SALE signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a nighttime urban intersection with a prominent yellow crosswalk. The camera moves forward across the street toward a modern building facade featuring bright neon vertical lighting and digital advertisements. The environment is sparsely populated with few pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with shops

events.description: enters covered area beneath the elevated highway structure
yellow taxi drives past on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing various pedestrians and illuminated shop fronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tan coat walking ahead on the sidewalk
yellow taxi driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning above the walkway
large screen displaying colorful animated content on the building wall
storefront with bright neon lighting and signage
large industrial ventilation fan mounted on building exterior
green neon sign indicating business is open
bright pink neon hotel signage with vertical lettering

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway, the scene becomes semi-covered with the concrete overpass overhead. The sidewalk is lined with various shops featuring bright neon signs and digital billboards. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction, and vehicles pass by on the left. The lighting is predominantly artificial neon reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with heavy neon signage and futuristic traffic

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection area with multi-lane traffic
navigating through active traffic while crossing the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide multi-lane intersection, weaving between futuristic vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car waiting at the intersection before accelerating
pedestrian with distinctive red hair standing near the crosswalk edge

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with yellow striping across multiple lanes
futuristic yellow sports vehicle with sleek design
curved ramp structure of the elevated highway system
commercial building featuring prominent Japanese character signage in neon
multiple large holographic displays suspended above the street
red sports car with glowing accents driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast intersection bathed in neon light from massive overhead digital billboards. The camera crosses the wide street amidst dense futuristic traffic including yellow and red sports cars. The elevated highway curves away to the left while a large building with Japanese neon signage dominates the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside elevated highway with commercial buildings

events.description: reaches the opposite curb and continues along the sidewalk next to the elevated highway
slight turn to follow the curving sidewalk alongside the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the elevated highway, passing various storefronts and street lamps

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket with backpack walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall residential building with orange facade and multiple windows
tall modern street light illuminating the sidewalk
yellow and black striped safety barrier along the road edge
concrete wall with colorful spray paint markings

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds along a sidewalk bordered by a yellow guardrail on the left and an orange apartment building on the right. The elevated highway runs parallel to the path on the left side. Sparse pedestrians walk along the pavement, and the area is lit by street lamps and building signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with industrial elements and debris

events.description: turns right into a narrow alleyway between buildings, leaving the main street
ambient light drops significantly in the confined alley space

agents.ego_description: entering a narrow alleyway filled with trash and industrial equipment, approaching a distant figure

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing at the end of the alley near industrial piping

entered.detail: confined passage between tall buildings with limited overhead visibility
scattered garbage and litter along the alley floor
large metal piping and ductwork running along the building wall
piles of wooden shipping crates and boxes
narrow passage continuing into the distance with dim lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly into a narrow enclosed alleyway between buildings. The space is dimly lit with trash and wooden crates scattered on the ground. Industrial pipes run along the right wall, and the path ahead grows darker. A solitary figure stands at the far end of the alley, creating a sense of isolation after the busy street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a vibrant neon metropolis that gradually narrows into a secluded, dimly lit alleyway. It begins by crossing a yellow urban intersection toward a modern building facade illuminated by vertical neon lights and digital advertisements. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts beneath the concrete canopy of an elevated highway, where artificial lights reflect off wet pavement and the sidewalk fills with shops and pedestrians. The scene then opens into a vast, bright intersection dominated by massive overhead billboards and dense futuristic traffic before proceeding along a sidewalk bordered by a yellow guardrail and an orange apartment building. Finally, the camera turns away from the open street and transitions abruptly into a narrow, enclosed alleyway filled with industrial pipes and scattered debris, ending in a dark space where a solitary figure stands in isolation.
